MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Ryan Ema is present.
Attorney Shauna Matlin is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brandon Espinosa is present.
Attorney Dmitri Pikman (ALRP) is representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Lalanne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of January 13, 2014 remains on calendar.
